my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Heads up - I already pushed before seeing this message. My change does touch image_to_base64: I replaced the inline 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(...); self.image_mimetype = ...' block with a single call 'self.get_image_mimetype()' (task explicitly requires decoupling that logic out of image_to_base64). It's already on team/agent2 (commit c662feee9). Since you're rewriting the body anyway with normalize_image_bytes, feel free to just call self.get_image_mimetype() in place of your own mimetype-guessing logic when you rebase/merge - that should keep things clean and avoid duplicate guess logic. Let me know if you want me to adjust anything on my end.
